title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos had the most views yesterday on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  AKANE vs Pau — Views: 58,625 | Yesterday: 21
BAND-MAID / Present Perfect (Official Teaser Video MIKU KOBATO) — Views: 48,767 | Yesterday: 19
BAND-MAID / Ready to Rock (Official Teaser Video)  TVアニメ「ロックは淑女の嗜みでして」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 346,032 | Yesterday: 16

choices.text: BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  AKANE vs Pau
BAND-MAID / Present Perfect (Official Teaser Video MIKU KOBATO)
